parseError: Current content is not valid JSON and cannot be parsed
selectHint: Select a command on the left to edit
ephemeralHint: When on, this command's slash reply is visible only to the user who triggered it (ephemeral); others can't see it. Applies to the whole trigger — ideal for sensitive actions like binding or privacy. Slash commands only.
commandKeyHint: Must match the plugin's real command name to route correctly; the slash name can differ
invalidSlashName: Only lowercase letters, digits, _ and -, length 1-32
localizations: Localized descriptions (shown per user's client language)
noLocalizations: No localized descriptions; the description above is shown to everyone
optionsHint: Each parameter is delivered by type: user→@mention, attachment→image/file, others→text. Required parameters must come before optional ones.
invalidOptionName: Only lowercase letters, digits, _ and -, length 1-32
choicesHint: Once set, this parameter becomes a dropdown on Discord; users can only pick from it, and the chosen value is passed to the command
noChoices: No choices set; users can type freely
choiceLocalizations: Display name localizations (shown per client language)
choicesIgnored: Choices are only valid for text/integer/number types; choices on the current type are ignored (not written on save)
choiceValueInt: Value must be an integer for integer type
choiceValueNum: Value must be a number for number type
availableHint: All commands provided by currently loaded plugins. Ones already in the registry are marked 'Added'; click an un-added one to add it, or add them all from the top right.
discoverEmpty: No available commands found (plugins may not be loaded)
cmdDuplicateKey: Duplicate command name (routing key) '{cmd}'; entries would overwrite each other on save
cmdInvalidSlash: '{cmd}' has an invalid slash command name
cmdRequiredAfterOptional: '{cmd}' required parameter {opt} comes after an optional one (Discord requires required-first)
cmdTooManyChoices: '{cmd}' parameter {opt} has more than 25 choices (Discord limit)
cmdChoiceNameRequired: '{cmd}' parameter {opt} has a choice missing its display name
cmdChoiceValueRequired: '{cmd}' parameter {opt} choice '{choice}' is missing a value
cmdChoiceValueBad: '{cmd}' parameter {opt} choice '{choice}' value is invalid for its type or too long
importHint: Paste exported JSON (whole table or a single command). Import only stages into the editor; click Apply to save.
importNotObject: Content must be a JSON object keyed by command name
importMergeHint: Overwrite same-named commands and append new ones; commands not mentioned are kept.
importReplaceHint: Replace the entire table with the imported content; commands not included are removed.
